headline: 8 Dividend S&P 500 Stocks Yield Enough To Still Be Worthwhile
summary: It's getting tougher to find S&P 500 dividend stocks that make any sense anymore. Thanks to skyrocketing stock prices, the S&P 500's yield is now less than 1%. Meanwhile, the yield on Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF is up to nearly 4%.
